ext.description: Automatically sort and number files in a folder
command.sortFolder.title: Sort and number this folder
command.sortWorkspace.title: Sort and number entire workspace
config.watchForChanges.description: Monitor file changes and auto-renumber sequentially
config.defaultFormat.description: Default numbering formats: space=「00 」, dot=「00.」, underscore=「00_」
config.defaultSortBy.description: Default sorting modes: name = by filename, created = by creation time
